NORMAN GRANT TO VACATE THE PREMISES ABOVEMENTIONED NO LATER THAN NOV. 15, 1995, AND STATES THAT THERE ARE NO OTHER PERSONS OCCUPYING THE PREMISES; 2.PLFFS ENTITLED TO RESTITUTION OF THE PROPERTY; LEASE IS FORFEITED, AND WRIT TO ISSED IMMEDIATELY AND EXECUTION STAYED TO NOV. 15, 1995. 3. PLFFS EXPRESSLY NOT WAIVING ANY CAUSES OF ACTION RELATING TO MONEY DUE, AS ATTY FEES,ETC, AND WHICH MAY BE BROUGHT IN A SEPARATE ACTION AT A LATER DATE. OTHER CONDITIONS ON THE RECORD. PER PLFF'S COUNSEL, A STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WILL BE PREPARED BY HIM (CONVEYED TO CLERK PERSONALLY -NOT ON RECORD)
